title: chrysanthemum suaveolens
intro: Chrysanthemum suaveolens, also known as the fragrant chrysanthemum or sweet chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to China. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum suaveolens include reducing fever, relieving headaches and other pain, and improving respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
